message:
fix(visualizations): eliminate TypeScript 'any' types and add deterministic rendering

Comprehensive type safety and rendering consistency improvements across
three visualization components.

## bakery-visualizations.tsx
- Add explicit TypeScript interfaces: ProcessState, TemporalProcess,
  DoorwayStep, NexusProcess to replace 'any' usage
- Move DOORWAY_STEPS constant outside component to module scope,
  preventing recreation on every render
- Type TemporalCard props with explicit interface instead of 'any'
- Type ProcessNexus state with NexusProcess[] interface
- Wrap initialProcesses in useMemo to prevent unnecessary recreations
- Initialize processesRef with initialProcesses instead of empty array
- Type updateProcess parameter with Partial<NexusProcess>

## barra-visualizations.tsx
- Add deterministicUnit() hash function for reproducible pseudo-random
  values: x = sin(seed * 12.9898 + 78.233) * 43758.5453
- Replace Math.random() in CosmosStars with deterministic seeds
  (i*3+11, i*3+17, i*3+23) for each coordinate axis
- Replace Math.random() in RegressionPlot with deterministic seeds
  (i*5+101, i*5+131, i*5+167) for x, z, size values

## hoeffding-visualizations.tsx
- Add HeroApi type interface for Three.js renderer state tracking
- Replace 'any' in api variable with explicit HeroApi | null type
- Specify import types for WebGLRenderer, PerspectiveCamera,
  BufferGeometry, and PointsMaterial

These changes fix React hydration mismatches from Math.random() during
SSR vs client render, and improve maintainability through explicit types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
